flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Birmingham-Southern College rose 67% between 2007 and 2010 ($9.0k → $15.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 46% at Birmingham-Southern College vs the 2004–2008 baseline (713 vs 1.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Birmingham-Southern College rose 15% between 2007 and 2010 ($24.3k → $27.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Birmingham-Southern College rose 15% between 2007 and 2010 ($24.3k → $27.9k).
